    Classes in org.springframework.ai.tool.toolsearch.index.lucene that implement ToolIndex
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    LuceneToolIndex
    Lucene-based tool searcher for indexing and searching tool descriptions.

  • Uses of ToolIndex in org.springframework.ai.tool.toolsearch.index.regex

    Classes in org.springframework.ai.tool.toolsearch.index.regex that implement ToolIndex
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    RegexToolIndex
    Regex-based tool searcher that converts natural-language queries into case-insensitive OR patterns and matches them against tool names and descriptions.

    class 
    VectorToolIndex
    Vector-based tool searcher for semantic search of tool descriptions.
